acceleration.label: Acceleration
acceleration.description: Gaps between major breakthroughs shrink over time.
acceleration.consideration: Capture cycle-time compression and whether this entry shortens downstream innovation loops.

convergence.label: Convergence
convergence.description: Technologies increasingly combine into composite systems.
convergence.consideration: Document which adjacent domains merge in this entry and what new capability appears at the intersection.

abstraction-layers.label: Abstraction Layers
abstraction-layers.description: Each era builds on prior layers, adding complexity and leverage.
abstraction-layers.consideration: Specify the lower-layer dependencies this entry assumes and the higher-layer behaviors it enables.

scale-expansion.label: Scale Expansion
scale-expansion.description: Systems move across scales: molecular to stellar.
scale-expansion.consideration: Record the primary scale of impact and whether this entry unlocks the next scale tier.

information-centrality.label: Information Centrality
information-centrality.description: Information processing becomes central across domains.
information-centrality.consideration: Describe how sensing, modeling, computation, and feedback loops drive value in this entry.

biological-digital-merger.label: Biological-Digital Merger
biological-digital-merger.description: The biological and digital boundary blurs over time.
biological-digital-merger.consideration: Note whether this entry directly couples biological systems with software, data, or machine control.

energy-requirements.label: Energy Requirements
energy-requirements.description: Higher capability tiers require orders-of-magnitude more energy.
energy-requirements.consideration: Estimate energy intensity, bottlenecks, and enabling infrastructure required for scale.

existential-inflection.label: Existential Inflection
existential-inflection.description: Prediction reliability drops sharply around singular transitions.
existential-inflection.consideration: Mark uncertainty boundaries and scenario branching where long-range forecasts become unstable.
